project.name: semantic-patterns
project.description: Policy-gated roadmap for AI-washing pipeline transformation.

policies.description: Labeling and adjudication decisions must not use downstream outcomes.
API outputs are assistive until a later benchmark gate passes.
Statistical significance is not an optimization target.
Retraining requires a frozen split registry with no held-out overlap.
Sentence quality must pass before manual labeling begins.
Sentence quality must pass before IRR work begins.

data_layers.description: Canonical index over the external SEC corpus without copying raw filing bodies.
Canonical AI sentence table partitioned by year.
Frozen split registry independent of sentence storage.
Canonical human and assistive label store.
Embeddings, centroids, metadata, and evaluation outputs.
Canonical sentence-level predicted labels for active source windows.

availability_condition.message: Historical years are not currently indexed in the active source window.

iterations.title: Foundation, Canonical Contracts, and Bounded 2024 Pilot
iterations.goal: Establish canonical contracts, clean the execution surface, and build a bounded sentence-table pilot from 2024 10-K filings.

phases.title: Baseline Asset Freeze
phases.goal: Freeze current evaluation assets and classify duplicates or deprecations before new data work starts.

tasks.title: Inventory validation assets
tasks.description: Inventory and fingerprint existing held-out and labeled validation assets.

preconditions.message: Held-out evaluation asset is missing.

phases.title: Repo Hygiene and Script Canon
phases.goal: Define canonical, transitional, and legacy scripts so the pipeline is understandable and maintainable.

tasks.title: Inventory scripts
tasks.description: Catalog scripts under canonical, transitional, and legacy buckets.

tasks.title: Publish script registry
tasks.description: Publish canonical entrypoints and legacy archive/removal intent.

preconditions.message: Script inventory must exist before publishing registry.

phases.title: Tooling Isolation
phases.goal: Prevent Atlas and similar external tooling from mutating the repo runtime environment.

tasks.title: Publish tooling isolation policy
tasks.description: Write Atlas and external tool isolation rules and wrapper expectations.

phases.title: Source Index Contract
phases.goal: Make the external SEC root the canonical raw-source interface and record active source windows.

tasks.title: Index external SEC root
tasks.description: Index the active external source window from SEC_SOURCE_DIR without copying raw filing bodies.

phases.title: Sentence Table Pilot 2024
phases.goal: Build a bounded 2024 10-K pilot manifest and canonical sentence table.

tasks.title: Generate bounded 2024 manifest
tasks.description: Generate a deterministic 2024 10-K filing manifest capped at 240 filings.

preconditions.message: Source index must exist before pilot manifest generation.

tasks.title: Extract canonical sentence table
tasks.description: Extract AI-related sentences from the bounded 2024 pilot into canonical sentence tables.

preconditions.message: Pilot manifest missing.

phases.title: Rubric and API Bootstrap
phases.goal: Prepare rubric v1 and bounded assistive API usage without promoting API output to canonical labels.

tasks.title: Publish rubric v1
tasks.description: Finalize the labeling protocol for the sentence-table pilot and assistive-only API usage.

preconditions.message: Sentence quality report missing.

tasks.title: Publish assistive API policy
tasks.description: Add the bounded assistive-only API policy file for the bootstrap smoke test.

quality_checks.message: Assistive API policy file missing or unreadable.

tasks.title: Run assistive API smoke test
tasks.description: Execute one bounded live Responses API request and record usage and result metadata.

preconditions.message: Sentence review export missing for API smoke test.

quality_checks.message: API smoke test did not pass.

phases.title: Label Ops Bootstrap
phases.goal: Generate the first clean labeling batch from the bounded pilot after sentence-quality gating.

tasks.title: Audit sentence integrity
tasks.description: Assess whether pilot-derived sentence datasets contain fragmented or low-quality rows before labeling.

preconditions.message: Sentence review export missing.

tasks.title: Prepare first labeling batch
tasks.description: Select clean candidate sentences and build the first labeling batch exports.

preconditions.message: Sentence table missing.

phases.title: Historical Diagnostics Baseline
phases.goal: Preserved historical diagnostics work completed before roadmap-model v2.

phases.title: Superseded Recovery Label Expansion
phases.goal: Preserved recovery branch work completed before roadmap-model v2.

phases.title: Superseded Recovery IRR Workflow
phases.goal: Preserved recovery IRR workflow completed before roadmap-model v2.

iterations.title: Label Expansion, Human IRR, and Frozen Training Set
iterations.goal: Build the first canonical human-labeled dataset, validate the rubric with true IRR, and freeze the split registry.

phases.title: Dataset Expansion 2024
phases.goal: Expand labeled coverage on clean pilot-derived sentences while keeping API use assistive only.

tasks.title: Expand canonical labels
tasks.description: Run bounded human labeling workflow on clean pilot-derived sentences.

preconditions.message: Labeling batch is missing.

phases.title: IRR and Adjudication
phases.goal: Run true human-human IRR on a blinded subset and adjudicate disagreements.

tasks.title: Audit IRR sentence integrity
tasks.description: Re-check sentence integrity before blinded IRR work starts.

preconditions.message: Review CSV is missing for IRR sentence audit.

quality_checks.message: IRR source quality is too low for reliable human rating.

tasks.title: Prepare and collect blinded IRR labels
tasks.description: Prepare blinded IRR subset and collect second-rater labels.

preconditions.message: Canonical labels must exist before IRR.

phases.title: Split Registry Freeze
phases.goal: Freeze train and validation sentence assignments after adjudication while keeping held-out separate.

tasks.title: Freeze split registry
tasks.description: Generate and fingerprint the canonical split registry from adjudicated labels.

preconditions.message: Adjudication artifacts are required before split freeze.

phases.title: Modeling Readiness Gate
phases.goal: Gate retraining on class balance, sentence quality, adjudication completion, and split integrity.

iterations.title: Retraining, Calibration, and Classification of 2021–2024
iterations.goal: Retrain the local model on adjudicated labels, calibrate on validation only, and classify the current active window.

phases.title: Centroid Retraining
phases.goal: Embed the adjudicated training set, compute centroids, and fingerprint metadata.

phases.title: Classifier Calibration
phases.goal: Calibrate thresholds on validation only and evaluate on the frozen held-out set.

phases.title: Active Window Batch Classification
phases.goal: Classify the active 2021–2024 source window with coverage and skip auditing.

phases.title: Aggregation Sanity
phases.goal: Aggregate sentence-level classifications to firm-year outputs and QA the active window snapshot.

iterations.title: Panel Construction and Conditional Historical Backfill
iterations.goal: Build the active-window panel and cleanly separate that from any deferred historical source expansion.

phases.title: Patents and Controls Ingestion
phases.goal: Refresh patents, controls, and crosswalk inputs required for the active-window panel.

phases.title: Panel Assembly 2021-2024
phases.goal: Merge active-window AI metrics with patents and controls into the canonical panel.

phases.title: Panel QA and Freeze
phases.goal: Validate panel schema, missingness, and transformation rules before freezing panel v1.

phases.title: Historical Window Expansion Readiness
phases.goal: Determine whether pre-2021 source availability permits historical backfill work.

iterations.title: Analysis Outputs and Research Release Packaging
iterations.goal: Produce analysis outputs and a release package without making statistical significance an optimization target.

phases.title: Regression Specification
phases.goal: Freeze regression inputs and define baseline and robustness specifications.

phases.title: Results Generation
phases.goal: Run baseline models and generate tables and figures with provenance.

phases.title: Robustness and Sensitivity
phases.goal: Run alternative specifications and summarize directional stability.

phases.title: Release Packaging
phases.goal: Package artifacts, docs, and reproducibility notes for research release.
